raw_consumer_statement:
My Best Buy credit card, issued through Citibank, was used fraudulently to make XXXX {$710.00} purchases ( total {$2100.00} ) of XXXX consoles from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX website. I contested the charges, Citibank " investigated, '' and determined that I was responsible for the charges. Here is my response : XXXX. I did not make any of these charges. I am a XXXX woman with no interest in XXXX. When I made my report to the XXXXXXXX XXXX police on XX/XX/XXXX, they immediately noticed the number of purchases and said it looks like someone used my card to purchase the consoles for resale. 
XXXX. The only place I used my actual Best Buy card was in the Best Buy store in XXXX. The police believe an employee of the store likely stole my card information, including the XXXX, and used it to make the fraudulent purchases. 
XXXX. The information Citibank received from the merchant is suspicious for XXXX reasons : a. First, it gives an email address that is not mine. The suspicious email is XXXX. That email address is not and has never been mine. It does not even exist. 
b. Second, the items were delivered to an address in XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX. I live in XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX and dont know anyone in XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX and I certainly never sent XXXX ( XXXX! ) Playstations to anyone there. The suspicious address is XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Again, I know no one at that address or in that city. 
XXXX. The XXXX number of the computer from which the items were ordered is not mine. I have included the IP Geolocation information proving the XXXX address they cited is also in XXXX, where I have never lived. Here is the IP Geolocation information I found : Geolocation Info IP : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX City : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  Police Report Number XXXX : I filed a report with the XXXX XXXX  police department on XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX the day I received your letter. Because the case looks like fraud to them, and is for a relatively high amount of money, they have turned it over to their XXXX XXXX for XXXX.
